hero.negativeSignalAudit: Self-deprecating about our own 2-2 feed; no gloating; the sell is one line framed as fact.

hero.text:
The board went +27 units in the last seven days. Since June 1: +60.

What members watched happen:

6-unit max plays: 6-1 since June 1
Soccer: 22-9, +25 units
Moneylines: 124-97, +46 units
Last night: 4-3, +5.7 — the board's top-rated play cashed again

Every pick graded. The Ls stay in the math.

You won't see most of these plays on this feed. Members get the board — that's what they pay for, and the numbers above are why.

The first week is free. After that, you'll understand why it isn't.
hero.rtLine: The first week is free. After that, you'll understand why it isn't.
hero.selfReplyAt25min: Today's board is already live — Argentina at noon, Colombia at 4, MLB tonight. nhlsavant.com/?ref=t0707a

hero.version: v8 FINAL — user correction: picks are paid product, not a fumble; lead with tier stats, frame the wall with pride
hero.babysit: Reply to EVERY comment in the first 60 min; each reply naturally says 'it's on the site every morning' — the funnel conversation IS the babysitting
hero.hookRationale: Greed stakes in two calm numbers; differentiated from tout spam by verified month-long history, complete sentences, Ls acknowledged, and a wall that sells by not selling.

gradePosts.argentinaWin:

Argentina ML dies at noon and takes 4 units with it. Heavy favorites lose too — that's why the board sizes them, not us.

Colombia +125 at 4. The day isn't over.
